= log


Calculates the natural logarithm (base e) of a number.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = this.value.log().round()

# In:  {"value":1}
# Out: {"new_value":0}

# In:  {"value":2.7183}
# Out: {"new_value":1}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.ln_result = this.number.log()

# In:  {"number":10}
# Out: {"ln_result":2.302585092994046}
----
